requirement_topic.zh: 消防安全与安装规范 — AS/NZS 5139:2019
requirement_topic.zht: 消防安全與安裝規範 — AS/NZS 5139:2019

summary.en: AS/NZS 5139:2019 is the New Zealand installation safety standard for battery systems used with power conversion equipment, alongside AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules and the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010. It addresses location, separation, ventilation, signage, protection, documentation, and emergency information. Fire and Emergency New Zealand may be involved through fire-engineering, emergency-response, or building-design review, and building consent under the Building Act may be required depending on the site, size, enclosure, occupancy, and council interpretation.
summary.zh: AS/NZS 5139:2019 是新西兰与电力转换设备配套使用的电池系统安装安全标准，并与 AS/NZS 3000 布线规则及《2010 年电气安全法规》共同适用。该标准涉及位置、隔离距离、通风、标识、保护、文件和应急信息。Fire and Emergency New Zealand 可能通过消防工程、应急响应或建筑设计审查参与；是否需要《建筑法》下的建筑许可，取决于场地、规模、围护结构、使用性质及地方议会解释。
summary.zht: AS/NZS 5139:2019 是紐西蘭與電力轉換設備配套使用的電池系統安裝安全標準，並與 AS/NZS 3000 佈線規則及《2010 年電氣安全法規》共同適用。該標準涉及位置、隔離距離、通風、標識、保護、文件和應急資訊。Fire and Emergency New Zealand 可能通過消防工程、應急響應或建築設計審查參與；是否需要《建築法》下的建築許可，取決於場地、規模、圍護結構、使用性質及地方議會解釋。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 5139:2019 — Electrical installations — Safety of battery systems
Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010 — New Zealand electrical safety regime
Building Act 2004 — building consent may apply depending on installation
Fire and Emergency New Zealand — fire safety and emergency-response stakeholder

summary.en: China design packages may use GB 51048 for electrochemical energy storage station design, GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage systems, and project fire design review under Chinese building-fire rules. These China documents do not map directly to New Zealand's AS/NZS 5139 location and clearance method, AS/NZS 3000 wiring practice, FENZ interface, or local council building-consent process.
summary.zh: 中国设计包可能采用 GB 51048 电化学储能电站设计规范、GB/T 36558-2023 电化学储能系统要求，以及中国建筑消防规则下的项目消防设计审查。这些中国文件不能直接对应新西兰 AS/NZS 5139 的位置和间距方法、AS/NZS 3000 布线实践、FENZ 接口或地方议会建筑许可流程。
summary.zht: 中國設計包可能採用 GB 51048 電化學儲能電站設計規範、GB/T 36558-2023 電化學儲能系統要求，以及中國建築消防規則下的項目消防設計審查。這些中國文件不能直接對應紐西蘭 AS/NZS 5139 的位置和間距方法、AS/NZS 3000 佈線實務、FENZ 接口或地方議會建築許可流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 51048 — Design code for electrochemical energy storage station
GB/T 36558-2023 — General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems in power systems
China building and fire design review rules for energy-storage projects

gap.en: AS/NZS 5139 clearances, restricted locations, ventilation assumptions, warning labels, emergency procedures, and installer documentation must be prepared for the New Zealand site. Factory drawings based on Chinese station design codes are not enough. The installer must also resolve AS/NZS 3000 wiring details and any council, building-consent, or FENZ fire-safety review before commissioning.
gap.zh: AS/NZS 5139 的间距、限制安装位置、通风假设、警示标签、应急程序和安装方文件，须针对新西兰具体场地编制。仅基于中国电站设计规范的工厂图纸并不足够。安装方还须在投运前解决 AS/NZS 3000 布线细节，以及任何地方议会、建筑许可或 FENZ 消防安全审查。
gap.zht: AS/NZS 5139 的間距、限制安裝位置、通風假設、警示標籤、應急程序和安裝方文件，須針對紐西蘭具體場地編製。僅基於中國電站設計規範的工廠圖紙並不足夠。安裝方還須在投運前解決 AS/NZS 3000 佈線細節，以及任何地方議會、建築許可或 FENZ 消防安全審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for installation where applicable — AS/NZS 5139 and AS/NZS 3000 are the relevant New Zealand AS/NZS installation framework; building consent and FENZ review may be required by project circumstances
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable domestic CN energy-storage station projects — China station design approval does not replace New Zealand installation approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A New Zealand BESS installation should be checked against AS/NZS 5139:2019, AS/NZS 3000, site-specific fire-safety assumptions, and any building-consent or FENZ review route. Chinese GB or project fire-design approvals are not substitutes for the New Zealand installation file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰 BESS 安装应按 AS/NZS 5139:2019、AS/NZS 3000、场地特定消防安全假设，以及任何建筑许可或 FENZ 审查路径进行核验。中国 GB 或项目消防设计批准不能替代新西兰安装文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 紐西蘭 BESS 安裝應按 AS/NZS 5139:2019、AS/NZS 3000、場地特定消防安全假設，以及任何建築許可或 FENZ 審查路徑進行核驗。中國 GB 或項目消防設計批准不能替代紐西蘭安裝文件。
